skills.summary: How to answer current weather, temperature, and forecast queries through direct web search capabilities.
Control the NM-CYD-C5 on-board WS2812 RGB LED on GPIO27. Use the single canonical script `nm_cyd_c5_rgb` with mode/color/brightness args; never hand-write led_strip or gpio code.

Control the NM-CYD-C5 on-board ST7789 LCD. Use the single canonical script `nm_cyd_c5_screen` (mode=color/text/message/clear) with synchronous run_lua_script; never hand-write display code or use async.
